info.heading: What is the Final Fantasy Relay?
info.paragraph1: The Final Fantasy Series Relay Race is a community celebration of Final Fantasy Speedrunning. The race runs non-stop across 4 days, while 2 or 3 teams compete to finish a set of games from the Final Fantasy franchise in the shortest combined time.
info.paragraph2: The event is run as a relay race, which means when a runner completes their game, the runner for the next game on the same team starts immediately. The team that finishes all of the games first is the winner!

liveStatus.chartCaption: Each line is a team's cumulative split delta vs the 3-team average — lower is faster.

schedule.metaDescription: Predicted run schedule for the current {eventName}, shown in your local timezone.
schedule.heading: Schedule
schedule.placeholderLead: The schedule will appear here closer to the event.
schedule.tzLead: Estimated start times. Adjusted for your local time zone: ({tz}).
schedule.aggressiveLead: This schedule uses aggressive run estimates. This is because, unlike traditional speedrun events, we cannot pause if we are ahead of schedule. For this event, runners are typically not expected to beat the estimate given.
schedule.updatedLead: This schedule is updated as runs are completed. Runs coming up soon will have a more accurate start time than runs later in the event.
schedule.sheetFormatUnexpected: Sheet format unexpected — could not find "Game", "Time", and "Start UTC" columns.
schedule.statusLastFailed: Last update failed at {ts}. Showing previous data.

splits.metaDescription: Live cumulative split times for the current {eventName}.
splits.heading: Splits
splits.lead: Live splits for the current relay. For each team you'll see:
splits.splitTimesDesc: are the cumulative splits for the entire relay.
splits.splitsByGameDesc: are reset for each game. Useful to see how each team performed for each game.
splits.segmentTimesDesc: are the duration of each split. Useful to see if a team might be catching up.
splits.sheetFormatUnexpected: Sheet format unexpected — could not find team columns.
splits.statusLastFailed: Last update failed at {ts}. Showing previous data.

history.metaDescription: Every Final Fantasy game played and every runner who has taken part across all {eventName} events.
history.heading: History
history.lead: Every Final Fantasy title that has been part of a Relay Race, and every runner who has taken part across all events.

games.lead: Every Final Fantasy title that has been part of a Relay Race, the version played in each relay, and how many times the game has been featured overall.

runners.lead: Every runner who has taken part in a Final Fantasy Relay Race, sorted by total appearances, with the game run in each relay.

pastResults.metaDescription: Previous winners and full per-relay breakdowns for every {eventName}.
pastResults.heading: Previous Winners
pastResults.lead: Every Final Fantasy Relay Race held to date, with team count, winner, and links to the VoDs.
pastResults.detailLead: Games, runners, and final times for each Final Fantasy Relay Race. Pick a tab to jump to that event.
pastResults.detailFollowup: For even more details, check out the

progressChart.ariaLabel: Cumulative split delta per team, in minutes from the three-team average
progressChart.statusUpdatedWaiting: Updated {ts} · waiting for the first split to be completed by all teams
progressChart.statusLastFailed: Last update failed at {ts}. Showing previous data.
progressChart.statusUnexpectedFormat: Sheet format unexpected — could not find team columns.
progressChart.perGameEmptyText: No completed splits for this game yet.
